testcase.name: test_get_reminder_preferences_customer
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auto_reminders.py:67: in test_get_reminder_preferences_customer assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid authentication credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
